name: Maple Apple Spice Cake
recipeIngredient: ⅔ cup Firmly packed light brown‑sugar
2 small Apples, peeled and finely chopped (about 1½ cups)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Stir together flour, baking powder, and cinnamon; set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, beat butter and sugar until fluffy.
Add eggs, maple syrup, and vanilla; mix well.
Gradually add the flour mixture; mix thoroughly.
Stir in apples and nuts.
Pour batter into a greased and floured 9‑inch square baking pan.
Bake 40–45 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean.
Cool, then spread with Cream Cheese Frosting.
Store covered in the refrigerator.
Cream Cheese Frosting: In a small mixing bowl, beat cream cheese, milk, and vanilla until smooth. Gradually beat in powdered sugar until smooth and spreading. Makes about 1 ¼ cups.
